title: 3D Create mod track items
description: 3D item models of the create mod's train track
body:
Ever wondered why the Create mod's beautful 3d models are for world placed track only?
Tired of having to decyfer pixel art in order to know what items are in your chests?

Introduceing ME (I), i made 3d models for the Invintory item, Held item, Ground item, and Item frame. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
(plus an easter egg if you manage to get one on your head)
</details>

REQUIRES:
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)
- NeoForge

Steam n' rails Support comming soon! 
(IThundxr i<3u)

[current support checklist for Steam n' rails]
- [✓ Andesite all varients] 
- [x Narrow guage ] 
- [x Standard guage ] 
- [x Wide guage ]
